sections.title: Synthesizing infinite-pixel images from finite-sized training data.
content:
A 1024x2048 image composed of 242 patches, independently synthesized by InfinityGAN with spatial fusion of two styles. 
                    The generator is trained on 101x101 patches sampled from 197x197 real images.

figures.description: Large scale landscape synthesis showing style blending and patch-based generation
InfinityGAN architecture diagram including Structure Synthesizer, Texture Synthesizer, and Discriminator

sections.title: Without carefully taming the positional information in the generator, other frameworks cannot generalize to extended image sizes at testing.

tables.description: Comparison table showing InfinityGAN vs COCO-GAN, SinGAN, and StyleGAN+NCI at different resolutions

sections.title: InfinityGAN + GAN-inversion (In&Out @ CVPR'22) = Seamless and arbitrarily-length image outpainting / inbetweening

figures.description: Comparison of Boundless, NS-outpaint, In&Out, and In&Out+InfinityGAN
Arbitrary-length inbetweening and cyclic panorama results

sections.title: More samples from models trained at higher-resolution settings.
We show that the two sets of latent variables learn different and diverse appearances.

figures.description: Grid showing variations in styles and local latent variables
QR codes for Project Page and PyTorch code repository
